glider_final.title: Equip the Netherite Glider (Gliders mod — fire-resistant, the best glider tier) with your Celestial armor

totem_carry.title: Carry 3 Totems of Undying as active insurance — the final build carries its own revival

subtitle.text: This is what survival at maximum investment looks like. Remember what Ch01 looked like.

description: Weapon: Celestial Netherite Sword (or your preferred weapon type)
Glider: Netherite Glider (fire-resistant) — replaces Elytra for active combat gliding
Note: Gliders cannot be repaired once destroyed by lightning — store spares
Survival items carried at all times:
Elytra + Fireworks for fast flight when Glider is not appropriate
You started with a wooden sword and no food.
This is what full investment looks like.
The system works if you use it.
→ Equip Netherite Glider with Celestial armor [check]
